name: TestCreateInputTable
title: TestCreateInputTable
syntax: TestCreateStringInputTable(char text[], char caption[], char info[]);
description: This function creates a selection dialog. To add a value table entry, use the command TestAddValueTableEntry or TestAddStringTableEntry. After all entries are added the dialog can be opened by the command TestWaitForInput.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: Text to be displayed in the entry dialog
